Package org.eventb.internal.ui.proofcontrol

Class DynamicDropdownManager

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.swt.events.SelectionAdapter
org.eventb.internal.ui.proofcontrol.DynamicDropdownManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
EventListener, org.eclipse.swt.events.SelectionListener, org.eclipse.swt.internal.SWTEventListener
public class DynamicDropdownManager extends org.eclipse.swt.events.SelectionAdapter
Manager for dynamic dropdown tactic lists.
